name: Tracheostomy and cricothyroidotomy
description: Procedures creating a neck (transtracheal) airway: tracheostomy and cricothyroidotomy (surgical or percutaneous).

en.name: Tracheostomy and cricothyroidotomy
en.shortDescription: Procedures creating a neck (transtracheal) airway: tracheostomy and cricothyroidotomy (surgical or percutaneous).
en.longDescription:
## Definition & Clinical Context

This set covers the procedures that create a tracheal airway through the front of the neck — a **tracheostomy** (an opening into the trachea, surgical or percutaneous) or a **cricothyroidotomy** (an opening through the cricothyroid membrane, typically an emergency rescue airway). Both bypass the upper airway and larynx, unlike endotracheal intubation. In source data this is a **procedure** record marking that the airway was created (or the tube inserted); there is no unit. It is recorded in intensive care, anaesthesia, and emergency settings. The procedures differ by site (cricothyroidotomy vs tracheostomy), technique (surgical/open vs percutaneous/Seldinger), and context (elective vs emergency).

## Included Concepts

The set is anchored on the SNOMED procedure hierarchies for cricothyroidotomy and tracheostomy creation (with descendants), plus the tube-insertion procedures. Grouped here by site.

### Cricothyroidotomy

Anchored on *Cricothyroidotomy* and *Cricothyroidotomy tube insertion* with their descendants.

- *4068680 / 173067007 — Cricothyroidotomy (SNOMED)*: the general concept.
- *4134560 / 398142004 — Emergency cricothyroidotomy (SNOMED)*.
- *4335586 / 232692007 — Open cricothyroidotomy (SNOMED)*: surgical.
- *4337731 / 232689008 — Percutaneous cricothyroidotomy (SNOMED)* and *4339624 / 232690004 — Percutaneous dilatational cricothyroidotomy (SNOMED)*.
- *37205949 / 785905003 — Cannula cricothyroidotomy (SNOMED)*, *37206251 / 785906002 — Scalpel bougie cricothyroidotomy (SNOMED)*, *37206252 / 785907006 — Wire guided cricothyroidotomy (SNOMED)*.
- *4337618 / 232683009 — Cricothyroidotomy tube insertion (SNOMED)* and its descendant *4337046 / 232684003 — Minitrach insertion (SNOMED)* (a small-bore cricothyroidotomy/minitracheostomy).

### Tracheostomy

Anchored on *Construction of tracheostomy* with its descendants, plus the tube-insertion concepts.

- *1073322 / 1303805000 — Construction of tracheostomy (SNOMED)*: the general concept.
- *4143728 / 307007002 — Percutaneous tracheostomy (SNOMED)* and *4134745 / 397930006 — Percutaneous dilational tracheostomy (SNOMED)*.
- *4166281 / 274969000 — Anterior tracheostomy (SNOMED)*, *4168864 / 274970004 — Lateral tracheostomy (SNOMED)*, *4199580 / 52536006 — Mediastinal tracheostomy (SNOMED)*.
- *4065590 / 21619009 — Permanent tracheostomy (SNOMED)*, *4195473 / 43988005 — Temporary tracheostomy (SNOMED)*, *4208093 / 55622001 — Tracheostomy, emergency procedure by transtracheal approach (SNOMED)*.
- *4337047 / 232685002 — Insertion of tracheostomy tube (SNOMED)*.
- *4337048 / 232686001 — Insertion of tracheal T-tube (SNOMED)*: placement of a tracheal T-tube (e.g. Montgomery) through a tracheostomy stoma.

## Excluded Concepts

Major head-and-neck cancer operations that include a synchronous tracheostomy are excluded, as they are laryngectomy procedures rather than airway-creation procedures:

- *4175285 / 50339005 — Complete laryngectomy with radical neck dissection, synchronous thyroidectomy and synchronous tracheostomy (SNOMED)*.
- *4216541 / 7240008 — Total laryngectomy with partial pharyngectomy and synchronous tracheostomy (SNOMED)*.

## Mapping Notes

- **Default concepts** when the source does not specify the technique: *4068680 / 173067007 — Cricothyroidotomy* for a cricothyroidotomy, *1073322 / 1303805000 — Construction of tracheostomy* for a tracheostomy. Map to a specific technique (percutaneous, open, emergency…) only when documented.
- **Cricothyroidotomy vs tracheostomy**: cricothyroidotomy is through the cricothyroid membrane (higher, usually an emergency rescue airway); tracheostomy is lower, through the tracheal rings. Map to the matching site.
- **Not endotracheal intubation**: placing a tube through the mouth/nose and larynx is a different procedure, captured in the Endotracheal intubation concept set.
- **Procedure, not device**: this set is the creation/insertion procedure. The tracheostomy *tube* (the device) is captured in the Tracheostomy tube concept set; tube *removal* (decannulation) and *changes* are in their own sets.
- **Laryngectomy with synchronous tracheostomy** is not mapped here (it is a laryngectomy procedure).

versions.author: Boris Delange
versions.message: Design and describe the set: anchor on SNOMED Cricothyroidotomy (4068680) + Cricothyroidotomy tube insertion (4337618) and Construction of tracheostomy (1073322), all with descendants, plus tracheostomy/T-tube tube insertion (4337047, 4337048). Excludes laryngectomy-with-synchronous-tracheostomy oncologic procedures. Resolves to 21.
